title: BFYDOAA 6/12PCS Faux Norfolk Pine Stems 43cm Greenery Christmas Pine Needles Branches for DIY Garland Wreath,Xmas Tree and Home Decoration (12pcs)
features: Realistic Appearance: Our branch leaves mimicked the real leaves of Norfolk pine,transiting from light to dark green, fluffed up well,creates a layered and nature appearance.
Material: These branches are made from PE material,ensuring durability and maintaining their bright look throughout the holiday. Pine needles are not easy to fall off,compared to real plant
Festive Atmosphere: Decorate tables, corners, windowsills and fireplaces. These branches bring festive joy and vitality to any space,to enhance the holiday atmosphere
Package: Each set includes 6 or 12 artificial Norfolk Pine Branches, each measuring 17 inches overall length, its flexible stem can be bent and cut to adapt to different vases
Crafting DIY Projects: Replenish Christmas trees and wreaths, make pine bushes, or adorn Christmas gifts and packaging, great addition to your holiday decor collection
description: Feature Great for winter decorations during Christmas, winter, New Year and festivals. Faux greenery stems can be a wonderful arrangement even if they are simply placed in a jar or vase. These fake pine branches are great fillers and great for swags and garlands. The artificial Norfolk branches can also be paired with berry, pine cones, and pine leaves to holiday setting. Features - Color: Green. - Material: PE. - Size: About 45 cm tall Note Slightly ventilate the product, and the odor will disappear in a few hours.
